subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! God hath aided thee and made thee to prosper until He brought thee to the Most Great Prison, where thou didst behold the Wronged One and hearken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد ایدک الله و وفقک الی ان احضرک فی السجن الاعظم و رایت المظلوم و سمعت
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
